title: Fix parameterized class typedef as interface type parameter (#7000)

features.name: parameterized class typedef as interface type parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with a typedef struct packed, used as an interface type parameter default value

features.name: scope resolution operator on type parameter typedef
features.description: Code should include an inner interface parameter using X::td_t syntax to reference a typedef from a parameterized class through the interface's type parameter

features.name: parameterized class instantiation with specific type
features.description: Code should include instantiating an interface with a type parameter set to a parameterized class specialized with a specific type
